name: claude-hooks-hook-delivery
tags: hook delivery, client.py, curl, FastAPI, dispatcher, LangGraph, pipeline, entry point
body:
How a Claude Code hook event reaches the graph:

Claude Code fires hook → hooks/client.py <Event>
  → enriches payload with CLAUDE_CWD
  → curl POST http://127.0.0.1:8766/hook/<Event>
  → FastAPI server (hooks/server.py, persistent, launchd-managed)
  → hooks/dispatcher.py _handle_<event>()
  → LangGraph session graph (SqliteSaver, in-process)

Checkpoint DB: ~/.claude/langgraph_checkpoints.db (persists across restarts)
Fail-open: client.py exits 0 with {} if server unreachable.
